things.name: Leptis Magna
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage finest Roman ruins in the world - Septimius Severus's birthplace

things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 1st-century Roman theatre overlooking the Mediterranean

things.description: Ottoman old town with the Red Castle, Marcus Aurelius arch and covered souqs

things.description: Tripolitanian history from Phoenician times in a vast Ottoman-era fortress

things.description: 163 AD Roman triumphal arch in the heart of the old medina

things.name: Ghadames Old Town (Oasis City)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage desert oasis town with labyrinthine whitewashed architecture

things.name: Wadi el-Hitan (Valley of Whales) Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage desert with prehistoric whale fossils

things.name: Green Square (Martyrs' Square)
things.description: Central plaza on the Mediterranean waterfront - heart of Tripoli

things.name: Bazin (Semolina Bread)
things.description: Libya's national dish - hard semolina bread served with lamb and vegetable ragout
